proposal.working_title: What an AI Consultant Actually Does in 2026 (And When to Hire One)
proposal.one_line_angle: BCG sells AI consulting to Fortune 500s. This post defines the role for operators and SMB owners, with a 90-day deliverables checklist and red flags that mean you're paying for slideware not working workflows.
outline_bullets: The Three Jobs of an AI Consultant: Strategist, Implementer, Change Agent
What an AI Consultant Should Actually Ship in the First 90 Days
Five Red Flags You're Paying for Slideware (and How to Hire an Operator Instead)
